Danielle Nicole Band LIVE @ Hamilton Live (DC) 03/20/26
Notes / Memories: Arrived just before 6, 12th in line. Walked in with Bob Lubbehusen and Ed Warburton — they saved a seat. She played one song using an all-white right-handed bass with an embedded working neon tube that had been built for Dusty Hill of ZZ Top.
